beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Angers SCO vs Strasbourg - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 33ème journée

After three consecutive home defeats against them between 2020 and 2022, Angers won their last home Ligue 1 match against Strasbourg, which also took place on MD33 last season.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: Angers a encaissé cinq buts ou plus en trois matches de Ligue 1 cette saison – un total à égalité avec Metz – avec sa plus lourde défaite contre Strasbourg.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Metz vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Metz vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33

After drawing the reverse fixture 1-1 in January, Metz could avoid defeat in both of their matches against Lorient in the same season for the second time in their nine campaigns together in the top-flight, after having previously done so in 1998-99.

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Villarreal vs Séville - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 36ème journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Villarreal have won their last four LaLiga matches against Sevilla, their longest winning streak against them in the competition. Sevilla are winless in their last seven away LaLiga matches against Villarreal  since a 3-2 victory in November 2017, their longest winless run away to the Yellow Submarine in the top flight.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Villarreal a remporté ses quatre derniers matches de Liga contre Séville, sa plus longue séquence de victoires contre eux dans la compétition.

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Valence vs Rayo Vallecano - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 36e journée

beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Le Valencia CF n'a remporté que deux de ses 14 derniers matches de Liga contre le Rayo Vallecano, après avoir remporté 11 de ses 15 précédentes rencontres dans la compétition.
